A London Pearl House — MCMLXXXIV

Four decades in the
art of the pearl

A London pearl house, four decades in the making. We gather pearls of rare quality across Asia and Europe. Each is composed by hand, for the jewellers we have chosen to carry it.

Discover the collections → Mer Bleu, our signature
Scroll
La Maison

A house built on the pearl,
and the trust of the trade

For forty years La Perle Blanche has supplied the fine jewellers of Europe with pearls of rare quality. We buy for lustre and character before size, turning away far more than we keep. Each piece is finished by hand, and reaches you only through the jewellers we have chosen to carry it.

The Work

One hand, a world of colour

From the cool white of a perfect round pearl to the warmth of golden South Sea and the colour of the coast — the range of the house, drawn together by a single European sensibility. A piece from each of our collections:

The luminous white.

Four Collections

Each magnificent,
each unmistakably its own

Not variations on a theme, but four distinct temperaments of the same pursuit — the moonlit whites of Luna, the golden light of Sole, the sculptural baroque of Marea, and the colour and panache of Riviera. Each is composed by hand, with the same care.

The Signature

Mer Bleu

Our one-of-one pendant — a single baroque pearl, crowned with blue sapphire and quietly lit with diamond. Made to measure, and never repeated. A jewel, too, for the person who is difficult to surprise.

Discover Mer Bleu →

offered through the few

We do not sell directly. Tell us a little of what you have in mind and where you are, and we will arrange for you to see the work through the partner jeweller nearest you — in confidence, and without obligation.

The Pendant

Mer Bleu

For the person who is difficult to surprise — a one-of-one jewel, and a gift with the discretion of an heirloom, that keeps the colour and quiet of a northern sea.

Mer Bleu pairs a freshwater baroque pearl with a crown of blue sapphire and a thread of diamond. The pearl is chosen first; everything else is composed to flatter it. The result is a pendant that feels found rather than manufactured — organic, aristocratic, and entirely its own.

Begin a commission →
Materials & Craft

Made to measure in London

  • The pearl, first

    A freshwater baroque pearl of high lustre is selected for its skin, its weight, and the way it turns light. Its silhouette decides the design.

  • A sapphire-blue signature

    Pear and round blue sapphires are matched by hand for tone, then set at the crown so the colour reads first across a room.

  • Diamond, in a whisper

    Brilliant-cut diamonds are pavé-set along a single sweeping line — light, not spectacle.

  • Mounted by our own hands

    Each setting is built around its pearl in our workrooms. Nothing is cast to a fixed template; the piece is finished to the stone it holds.

In The Wearing

Composed to be worn,
not admired from afar

Against the skin the sapphire reads first; the pearl gives up its lustre only as it moves.

Why It Is Unique

A private commission, not a repeated object.
No two Mer Bleu pendants are alike.

Because the pearl is natural and irregular, the pendant composed around it cannot be made twice. The one chosen for you will be the only one of its kind.

For The Occasion

Given when it matters most

Anniversaries

To mark a year that asks for more than the expected.

Milestone Birthdays

A jewel for a decade worth naming.

Weddings

A bridal piece, or a gift held for the day itself.

Heirlooms

Composed once, to be passed onward without apology.

A Companion

Mer Bleu, en boucles

For those who wish to carry the signature further, the pendant has a companion in the ear: a drop of pearl beneath a fall of blue sapphire and diamond, in white gold. Composed to be worn with the pendant, or quietly alone.

Like the pendant, the earrings are made to measure and offered only through a partner atelier.

The Composition

Three elements, one accord

i

The Sapphire

A sapphire-blue signature set at the crown — the colour that gives the piece its name and its sea-light.

ii

The Diamond

A discreet line of diamond, never the loudest note. It is there to catch light, not to announce itself.

iii

The Baroque Pearl

A freshwater baroque pearl, chosen for its character. Its shape is the reason the pendant can never be repeated.

A Private Atelier

Selected privately.
Composed individually.

We are not a shop, and Mer Bleu is not a repeated object on a shelf. Each pendant begins with a pearl drawn from our own holdings and is built around it — its proportions, its mounting, its drop, all answered to the single pearl in hand.

Because we sell to the trade rather than to the public, your Mer Bleu reaches you through a jeweller we trust. The experience is one only our partner houses can extend.

The Mood

Quiet wealth, worn close

A sapphire-blue signature with the colour and calm of a northern sea — a jewel made to be lived in, not put on display.

A gift with the discretion of an heirloom — selected privately, composed individually.

— La Perle Blanche, London

The Collections

Four moods,
one hand

Beyond our signature pendant, the house keeps four singular collections — each a different temperament of the same pursuit: pearls of rare quality, composed by hand. Like everything we make, they reach you only through a curated circle of partner ateliers.

A Collection

Luna

The luminous white — round pearls of high lustre, lit only by diamond and white gold.

Luna is the house in its clearest voice: a perfectly round pearl, the cool of white gold, and diamond used as light rather than ornament. These are the pieces worn from morning to evening without a second thought — quiet, certain, and never out of season.

Request a private viewing → All collections
The Character

Pearls chosen for their moonlight

  • Round, and rare

    Only pearls of even shape and deep lustre are kept for this collection; the eye should find no fault as the piece turns.

  • White gold, cool and clear

    Settings are kept fine and unhurried — a frame that flatters the pearl without competing with it.

  • Diamond, in a whisper

    Brilliant-cut stones trace a single line of light. They are there to be caught, not counted.

  • Worn through the day

    Composed to move from a desk to a dinner unchanged — the everyday luxury of a great pearl.

The Pieces

The luminous white

The pieces shown are drawn from the collection to convey its character; each is finished by hand, and yours may differ in the pearl it is built around.

Through Our Partner Ateliers

Begin with a single pearl

Luna is presented through our partner ateliers. Tell us where you are, and we will arrange a private viewing nearest you.

Request a private appointment →
A Collection

Marea

A caprice in baroque — irregular pearls, each one impossible to repeat.

Marea gathers the pearls that refuse to be ordinary. Baroque and freeform, each is shaped by nature alone, and the white-gold setting is built around its silhouette rather than the other way about. As with Mer Bleu, no piece in Marea can be made twice.

Request a private viewing → All collections
The Character

Shaped by the sea, not the bench

  • The baroque pearl, first

    A pearl is chosen for its character — its curve, its skin, the colours that surface as it moves — and the design follows it.

  • One of one, by nature

    Because the pearl is irregular, the finished jewel cannot be repeated. The one you keep is the only one of its kind.

  • White gold and diamond

    Fine settings and a thread of diamond hold the pearl without taming it.

  • Sculptural, never staged

    These are pieces with presence — organic, architectural, and quietly bold.

The Pieces

A caprice in baroque

The pieces shown are drawn from the collection to convey its character; each is finished by hand, and yours may differ in the pearl it is built around.

Through Our Partner Ateliers

Choose the pearl that could be no other

Each Marea piece begins with a single baroque pearl. We will gather a small selection through your nearest partner atelier.

Request a private appointment →
A Collection

Sole

Warmth in gold — golden South Sea pearls set in the yellow gold of a southern light.

Sole turns toward the sun. Golden South Sea pearls — among the rarest the house finds — are set in warm yellow gold, with diamond used sparingly to lift the colour. These are pieces with the glow of late afternoon, for those who wear gold as a second skin.

Request a private viewing → All collections
The Character

The colour of a southern afternoon

  • Golden pearls, patiently found

    The golden South Sea pearl is rare and slow to gather; we keep only those with an even, honeyed glow.

  • Yellow gold, warm to the skin

    Settings are worked in warm gold to carry the pearl's colour rather than cool it.

  • Diamond, used sparingly

    A single stone or two, set only to catch the light the pearl already holds.

  • Worn with ease

    Opulent without effort — gold and pearl, and very little else.

The Pieces

Warmth in gold

The pieces shown are drawn from the collection to convey its character; each is finished by hand, and yours may differ in the pearl it is built around.

Through Our Partner Ateliers

Take the warmth of the south

Sole is offered through our partner ateliers. Tell us where you are, and we will arrange a private viewing.

Request a private appointment →
A Collection

Riviera

Colour and character — rose gold, coloured pearls, coral and a touch of contrast.

Riviera is the house at its most expressive. Here the pearl keeps company with colour: blush and lavender pearls, warm coral, citrine, and the deep contrast of onyx, set in rose and yellow gold. These are pieces with the ease and panache of the coast — worn for the pleasure of them.

Request a private viewing → All collections
The Character

Worn for the pleasure of it

  • Colour, welcomed

    Pink and lavender pearls, coral, citrine and onyx — the palette of a long coastal summer.

  • Rose and yellow gold

    Warm metals to match the warmth of the colour; nothing cold, nothing severe.

  • Character over caution

    Statement collars, chandeliers and clusters, for those who like to be seen — lightly.

  • Handcrafted, one by one

    Each piece is composed and finished by hand in our workrooms.

The Pieces

Colour and character

The pieces shown are drawn from the collection to convey its character; each is finished by hand, and yours may differ in the pearl it is built around.

The House

La Perle Blanche

A pearl house with four decades behind it — built quietly, on the trust of the jewellers we supply and the quality of the pearls we find.

40
Years In Pearls
2
Continents Sourced
1984
Established
Sourcing

Found, not ordered

Our pearls are drawn from the finest suppliers across Asia and Europe — relationships built over decades, not catalogues. We buy for lustre and character before size, and we turn far more away than we keep.

It is this discipline, more than anything, that the jewellers of Europe have trusted us for since the house began.

Craft & Trade

A house to the trade

For forty years our work has reached the public through fine jewellers — never from our own counter. Every piece is finished by hand in our workrooms, to the stone it holds.

Mer Bleu continues that tradition. We extend it only through a curated circle of partner ateliers, each chosen to offer an experience equal to the jewel.

For Jewellers

La Perle Blanche is carried by a select circle of jewellers. Enquire about partnership →

In Confidence

Speak with the house

Whether you seek a jewel or wish to carry one, we would be glad to hear from you.

Begin an enquiry →
Enquiries & Bespoke Matching

Tell us what you
have in mind

Every piece we make is composed to the person who will wear it. Tell us the colour, the form, or the occasion you have in mind, and we will match it to the right pearl and the right collection — then arrange for you to see it through the partner jeweller nearest you. There is no cost and no obligation; only a conversation.

Bespoke matching

We do not sell directly. Tell us what you are looking for, and we will find the pearl and compose the piece to suit — presented through the partner jeweller nearest you.

For jewellers

If you would like Mer Bleu presented in your house, please note this in your message and we will be in touch privately.

Your enquiry reaches the house directly and is held in confidence. We reply personally, never with a sales sequence.

Thank you — your enquiry is with us

A member of the house will write to you personally within two working days to arrange the next step.

A London pearl house of four decades, sourcing pearls of rare quality and composing them by hand — offered through a curated circle of fine jewellers.
